tools.name: fishing_play
tools.description: 执行钓鱼指令,一切游戏操作走这里(如 cast 5、status、buy basic_worm 3;支持用 ; 叠加最多 8 条)。 / Run a fishing command; the main gameplay channel.

tools.name: fishing_manual
tools.description: 玩法说明与全部指令列表(中文)。 / Game manual and full command list (Chinese).

tools.name: fishing_new_game
tools.description: 重开一局(会覆盖当前进度,必须传 confirm:true 确认)。 / Start over (overwrites progress; requires confirm:true).

tools.name: fishing_share_card
tools.description: 生成可分享的图鉴 / 稀有时刻分享卡(kind: encyclopedia | moment);也可填 fish:<中文鱼名> 给某条已钓到、收录进图鉴的鱼单独出一张卡。 / Generate a shareable card (encyclopedia | moment); optionally name a caught fish to card it.

tools.name: fishing_save_info
tools.description: 存档元信息(路径 / schema 版本 / 身份模式 / 进度摘要,不含游戏机密)。 / Save metadata (path, schema version, identity mode, progress); no game secrets.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "fishing_play" appears informational but accepts parameters (command) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "fishing_save_info" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: 存档元信息(路径 / schema 版本 / 身份模式 / 进度摘要,不含游戏机密)。 / Save metadata (path, schema version, identity mode, progress); no game secrets.
